coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is easy because it's supposed to be. Don't make it harder than it needs to be.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Endurance pace: majority of work should be nose breathing. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Base training: the secret weapon of every great cyclist.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Zone 2. Easy effort. This is recovery in disguise.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/10. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1. Your legs have opinions. Noted.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: VO2max interval: maximize time at >90% VO2max. Breathing should be gasping.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Deep into the workout now. Stay present. One interval at a time.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. This is the price. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 88-95 rpm, 92% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 92%, Cadence: 88-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: The pain is temporary. The fitness is permanent. Don't you dare back off now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midway through set 1. Power should feel hard but repeatable. Adjust if fading.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Your competition is resting. You're getting faster. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This interval is dedicated to whoever said 'it doesn't get easier, you just go faster.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. This is the price. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1: 55% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1. Your legs have opinions. Noted.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 2. The discomfort is the adaptation. Embrace it or go home.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Threshold block: maximize time at lactate threshold without crossing into VO2 territory.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: One more block. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This is sustainable. Technically. If you redefine 'sustainable.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay controlled. Don't let power spike. Smooth is fast.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. This is the price. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Standing at 82-90 rpm, 130% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 130%, Cadence: 82-90 rpm, Position: Standing. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This should hurt just enough to make you question your sanity. You're doing it right.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Threshold effort at 95% FTP, 82-90 rpm, Seated. Sustainable discomfort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is where mediocre riders crack and champions push through.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 2 of 3. Like Groundhog Day, but with more lactic acid.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Almost done. Stay strong. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. This is the price. Pay it.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1. Your legs have opinions. Noted.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 55%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 8. Yes, it hurts. That's the price of being faster than yesterday.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 8/10 — hold 112% FTP at 75-85 rpm. Seated. 240s of work left in this set.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 8 of 10 — you've done this before and you can do it again.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 8. Your legs are filing a formal complaint. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Almost there. Keep the power smooth and steady.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your lungs want to quit. Your mind wants to quit. But you won't. Rep 9 of 10.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: You've accumulated 26min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 9 of 10 — you've done this before and you can do it again.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The good news: you're almost done. The bad news: you still have 1 reps left.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 10/10. Your legs are screaming. Good. That means it's working.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final rep of this set. Empty the tank — you have 0s recovery coming.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final rep. Leave nothing in reserve. You can rest when you're done.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 10: where dreams go to die, and watts go to live.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last one! Finish strong. You've earned the cooldown.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-100 rpm, 60% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.
